promoted_facts.fact: Franchise Agreement Article 5.D. explicitly caps Contact Center Fee at 3% of Gross Sales (not 5% as stated in Item 19 footnote)
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Section E / Franchise Agreement Article 5.D. (page 95)

promoted_facts.fact: Competitive Business definition includes home healthcare (skilled care, nursing, therapy) in addition to non-medical care — noncompete scope is broader than FDD summary suggests
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Section E / Franchise Agreement definitions (page 75)
promoted_facts.value: Includes non-medical at-home care AND home healthcare/skilled nursing/therapy

promoted_facts.fact: Jury trial waiver and class action waiver both present in Franchise Agreement
Limitations period for claims: 1 year from discovery or 2 years from act/omission, whichever is earlier (except franchisor payment, restrictive covenant, and IP claims)
promoted_facts.value: 1 year from discovery or 2 years from act/omission

promoted_facts.fact: Three-or-more cured defaults triggers non-curable termination (ratchet provision)
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Section E / Franchise Agreement Article 16.A.(1) (page 124)
promoted_facts.value: 3+ curable defaults even if cured = non-curable default

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor has direct live access to all Business Management System Data at all times
promoted_facts.value: Franchisor has direct live access and storage-based access to all BMS data

promoted_facts.fact: Income statement shows $1,414 in Amortization & Depreciation but balance sheet shows $0 fixed assets and $0 accumulated depreciation — minor inconsistency in financial statements
No related party transaction note in financial statements despite 100% of revenue from affiliate
